name: Pressure Points
description: Four-stage touch-controlled voltage source. Each stage has three tuned voltages (X/Y/Z) and a pressure-sensitive copper touchplate that fires a gate and outputs pressure CV. Up to four units chain into an 8- or 16-stage controller.

controls.name: Tuned Voltage Row X
controls.description: Top row of knobs. Sets Tuned Voltage X for each stage. Range extends higher than the other two rows, useful as a settable gate source.

controls.name: Tuned Voltage Row Y
controls.description: Middle row of knobs. Sets Tuned Voltage Y for each stage. Typical range for 1V/oct pitch when calibrated.

controls.name: Tuned Voltage Row Z
controls.description: Bottom row of knobs. Sets Tuned Voltage Z for each stage.

controls.name: Touch Plate 1–4
controls.description: Copper finger-plates. Touching selects the Active Stage and generates gate plus pressure CV. Requires clean bare hands — the finger closes the circuit.

controls.name: Digit Trimmer
controls.description: Internal trimmer pot for touchplate sensitivity. Accessed from the right side of the PCB with power off. More CW increases sensitivity for dry/small fingers or vertical installations.
controls.detail: Default: 40% CW · adjust with power OFF

controls.name: Close 4 Master / EXPAND jumpers
controls.description: Rear headers configuring whether the unit is Master (rightmost in chain) or slave. Master has Close 4 Master closed; chained slaves leave them open. EXPAND headers also jumper for standalone use.

outputs.name: Tuned Voltage Out X
outputs.description: Unified output carrying the X voltage of whichever stage is currently Active.

outputs.name: Tuned Voltage Out Y
outputs.description: Unified output carrying the Y voltage of whichever stage is currently Active.

outputs.name: Tuned Voltage Out Z
outputs.description: Unified output carrying the Z voltage of whichever stage is currently Active.

outputs.name: CH 1 Pressure Output
outputs.description: Pressure CV from stage 1. Amplitude proportional to finger contact area and force.

outputs.name: CH 1 Gate Output
outputs.description: Gate output for stage 1 while touchplate 1 is held.

outputs.name: CH 2 Gate Output
outputs.description: Gate output for stage 2 while touchplate 2 is held.

outputs.name: CH 3 Gate Output
outputs.description: Gate output for stage 3 while touchplate 3 is held.

outputs.name: CH 4 Pressure Out / Combined Pressure
outputs.description: Pressure CV from stage 4. Normalized to the Combined Pressure BUS — when nothing else is patched into CH 4, this jack emits a mix of all four pressure signals.
outputs.normalizedTo: Combined Pressure BUS of all 4 stages

outputs.name: CH 4 Gate Out / Combined Gate
outputs.description: Gate output for stage 4. Normalized to the Combined Gate BUS — when nothing is patched, this jack emits a gate whenever any stage is touched.
outputs.normalizedTo: Combined Gate BUS of all 4 stages

behaviors.name: Active-stage selection
behaviors.description: Touching a plate selects that stage. The X/Y/Z common outputs switch to display that stage's tuned voltages. Functions as an analog sequencer played by hand.

behaviors.name: Pressure-sensitive CV
behaviors.description: Pressure output amplitude scales with flesh-to-copper contact area. Light fingertip tap produces a low CV; flat-finger press with force produces maximum. Per-stage outs are independent; CH 4 pressure is also a mix bus.

behaviors.name: Combined Gate BUS
behaviors.description: With nothing patched to CH 4 Gate, the jack carries a logical OR of all four stage gates. Stacking any gate output to a single gate input also sums gates.

behaviors.name: Row X as gate source
behaviors.description: Top row voltage range reaches +8V — high enough to trigger most gate inputs. Setting a stage's X knob full CW and another full CCW turns the stage selection into a toggled gate at the X output.

behaviors.name: Chaining with CHAIN cable
behaviors.description: Up to four Pressure Points units chain into 8- or 16-stage controllers via rear headers. Master unit keeps Close 4 Master jumpers closed; slaves open them. Gate and Pressure busses extend across the entire chain.

behaviors.name: BRAINS expander
behaviors.description: BRAINS adds clock/reset/address CV inputs, turning the touchplates into a clockable 4- or 8-step sequencer. Maximum is two Pressure Points per BRAINS. Jumper on BRAINS selects 1PP or 2PP mode.

behaviors.name: Digit Trimmer calibration
behaviors.trigger: dry skin / vertical install / weak response
behaviors.description: Touchplate sensitivity varies with skin moisture, finger size, and orientation. Adjust internal trimmer CW to compensate for dry fingers or vertical racks; CCW for greater pressure-CV resolution at the cost of fast sliding between plates.

patchIdeas.name: Tactile 4-note keyboard
patchIdeas.patch: Row Y → VCO V/Oct · Common Gate → envelope Trig · envelope → VCA CV · tune Y knobs to four pitches · press plates to play notes
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:
* Row Y: tune to 4 pitches

- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Y) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Pressure Points (CH 4 Gate / Combined) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Preset patch-state recall
patchIdeas.patch: X/Y/Z rows become three CVs per preset · Common Pressure adds expressive layer per stage · pick a stage = recall three timbre/modulation values at once
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:
* Row X: cutoff per preset
* Row Y: resonance per preset
* Row Z: FM index per preset

- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out X) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Y) >> Filter (Resonance)
- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Z) >> VCO (FM)
- Pressure Points (CH 4 Pressure / Combined) >> VCA (CV) // expressive touch

patchIdeas.name: Toggle / latch switch
patchIdeas.patch: Two stages of one PP · stage A X knob full CW (+8V = ON) · stage B X knob full CCW (0V = OFF) · tap A to turn a destination on, tap B to turn off
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:
* Stage 1 Row X: full CW (ON)
* Stage 2 Row X: full CCW (OFF)

- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out X) >> Destination (Gate/Mute In) // latched state

patchIdeas.name: Pressure-modulated wavefolder
patchIdeas.patch: Common Pressure → DPO Fold attenuator full CW · Fold panel CCW · press harder to bloom harmonics from a clean sine
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:

- DPO (Sine Out) -> Output (L)
- Pressure Points (CH 4 Pressure / Combined) >> DPO (Fold CV)

patchIdeas.name: Morphagene splice picker
patchIdeas.patch: Common Gate → Morphagene Play · Row Y → Morphagene Organize · each stage selects a splice and fires playback with its own touch-triggered gate
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:
* Row Y: tune to splice voltages

- Pressure Points (CH 4 Gate / Combined) g> Morphagene (Play)
- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Y) >> Morphagene (Organize CV)
- Morphagene (Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bongo with damping
patchIdeas.patch: FM VCO → Optomix · Common Gate → Strike · stage 3 Gate → Damp via attenuator · touch 4 to strike, touch 3 to dampen
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:

- VCO (Out) -> Optomix (In)
- LFO (Sine) >> VCO (Linear FM) // 2-op FM
- Pressure Points (CH 4 Gate / Combined) g> Optomix (Strike)
- Pressure Points (CH 3 Gate Output) g> Optomix (Damp)
- Optomix (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked 4-step sequencer (with BRAINS)
patchIdeas.patch: BRAINS attached · clock → BRAINS clock · reset → BRAINS reset · Row Y now acts as a 4-step pitch sequence, advanced by the clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
PRESSURE POINTS:
* BRAINS expander attached (1PP mode)
* Row Y: step pitches

- Clock (Out) c> BRAINS (Clock)
- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Y) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Pressure Points (CH 4 Gate / Combined) g> Envelope (Trig)
